top_signals.title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon
top_signals.summary: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sunak calls for minimum wage quango to be abolished
top_signals.summary: Former Chancellor and Prime Minister Rishi Sunak has said that his decisions to hike the national minimum wage backfired as he called for a quango overseeing low pay to be abolished.  Sunak appeared to admit that his decision to increase the national living wage has contributed to job struggles faced by young people.  In an [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
